message:
JSON stringify: Add @setRuntimeSafety(false) to escape function

Minor optimization on hot path (writeEscapedStringDirect).
Performance: Stable at 1.25x slower than Rust.

Tried and reverted:
- Loop unrolling (4-byte): no gain
- Buffer pooling: worse (2.34x)
- 2x over-allocation: worse (1.40x)
- Small int fast path: worse (1.34x)
- @memcpy everywhere: worse (1.62x)
- 2-byte escape array: worse (1.51x)

Current: 1.24-1.26x slower (590ms vs 470ms)
Gap to #1: ~120ms (20%)
